_doc: civbuilder_v1 — AoE2 DE custom civilization definition. All keys with null values are optional overrides; omit them or leave null to use defaults.

unique_unit._doc: km_idx selects from the KM custom-UU catalog. Set to null to use a vanilla unit via vanilla_id instead (Phase Two).
unique_unit.name: Vanguard
unique_unit.description: Elite shock trooper that ignores enemy fortifications.

overrides._doc: Absolute stat values for base and elite tiers. Omit or null = inherit from base unit. cost_* applies to both tiers.

advanced_flags._doc: Boolean traits applied to both tiers unless noted. regen_amount/interval drive HP regen rate. bonus_dmg_resist is a percentage (50 = 50% less bonus damage). charge_pool/rate configure charge attacks.

_section_second_uu: ── Second Unique Unit (Phase Two — not yet implemented) ─────────────────

castle_ut._doc: mode='vanilla' picks an existing tech by vanilla_id and re-labels it. mode='custom' builds a fully custom tech from effects[].
castle_ut.name: Advance Guard

tree._doc: Unit, building, and tech IDs that this civ has access to. Mirrors the wizard tech-tree editor output.

_section_unit_overrides: ── Unit Overrides (Phase Two — not yet implemented) ─────────────────────

unit_overrides._doc_example: Spearmen +5 HP, +1 attack on this civ.

_section_button_moves: ── Button Grid Overrides (Phase Two — not yet implemented) ──────────────

button_moves._doc_example: Move Spearman to button slot 4 at the Barracks to avoid overlap.

_section_free_techs: ── Free / Pre-researched Techs (Phase Two — not yet implemented) ─────────

free_techs._doc_example: Give Loom for free at game start (age 1 = Dark Age).
